title: Website Login Issue
description: Users are unable to log in using their email and password.

title: Payment Gateway Error
description: Payment transactions are failing during checkout.

title: Profile Update Bug
description: Customers cannot update their profile information.

title: Dashboard Loading Slow
description: The admin dashboard takes more than 10 seconds to load.

title: Email Notification Missing
description: Order confirmation emails are not being sent.

title: Mobile Layout Broken
description: The website layout is not responsive on mobile devices.

title: Search Function Not Working
description: Search results are not displaying correctly.

title: Data Export Failure
description: Users cannot export reports to CSV format.

title: Password Reset Error
description: Password reset links are expiring immediately.

title: Report Generation Delay
description: Monthly reports are taking too long to generate.
